title: taraxacum tatrense
intro: Taraxacum tatrense, also known as the Tatren dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is commonly found in mountainous regions of Eastern Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other bioactive compounds. Taraxacum tatrense is used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, and can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its health benefits.
